problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
